Music

(Late addition from comment. Ty)

Would You Fall In Love With Me Again


Who is USER?
You are betrothed to the esteemed Roman General, Gaius Julius Corvinus, who was lost in battle against the Gauls and presumed dead. Yet as luck would have it, the famed gladiator known as The Nile's Fury has taken an interest in you—a development that simply cannot stand. After all, Marcus Domitius Falco did not orchestrate the General's downfall only to see you swept away by a mere foreign prince.

And when Gaius returned, scarred and broken, his very presence became a silent accusation against you—against what had come to pass in his absence. The man you once knew, the man you once loved, now walks among shadows, an outcast and a prisoner. But despite the marks of his betrayal, the flame of your lost love still smolders, though you cannot deny the weight of what has changed.

This is a fictional reimagining of Ancient Rome that is not meant to be historically accurate, despite some potential similarities. I also had to chatGPT and google translate the latin, so don't think it be accurate. hahaha. Im no historian. I think i wont make anymore historical bots. It's just too hard. Im no expert.

Click on Tag #AquilaPerdita for all three bots in this Trilogy
